title: Oreganized Tetra Tweaks
description: A mod that adds compatibility between Oreganized's Electrum tools and Tetra
body: This mod adds a material called Electrum Plated Diamond to replace the standard conversion to Electrum tools for Oreganized's Electrum tools. Oreganized's electrum tools require using the Smithing Table on diamond tools, which means they have drastically higher stats compared to electrum tools from other mods, which means that you lose out on a lot from converting to Tetra's tools. Electrum Plated Diamond tools are repaired with Electrum Plated Diamonds, which can be obtained by combining a Diamond and an Electrum Ingot in the Smithing Table. It has a mining level of Netherite, and stats that are in between Electrum and Diamonds, with its main stats being a copy of Oreganized's Electrum tools. Electrum Plated tools have the Arrested and Hasted Improvements. Hasted increases speed by 0.2 (attack speed, draw speed*, shield raise speed) when used on the 'main' parts of a tool. The Draw Speed boost is multiplicative, making Hasted's effect stronger on Bows and Crossbows.
